Who We Are

Investing with conviction

Moso Capital bridges the gap between academia and industry. We invest in pre-seed and seed-stage companies, giving our analysts hands-on experience in sourcing, evaluating, and supporting exceptional founders.

Early Stage
We focus on pre-seed and seed investments where our network and expertise can make the greatest impact.
Founder-First
We partner with founders long-term, offering mentorship, connections, and strategic resources beyond capital.
Student-Run
Our analysts bring fresh perspectives and rigorous academic training to every investment decision.

About Us

We invest in people
before products

Moso Capital is a student-run venture fund dedicated to backing early-stage founders with the capital, mentorship, and network they need to build enduring companies.

Founded by a group of students with a shared belief that the best investors are those closest to innovation, we operate at the intersection of rigorous analysis and entrepreneurial empathy.

We write pre-seed and seed checks ranging from $100K to $500K, focusing on technology, sustainability, and consumer markets. Beyond capital, we offer founders access to our network of advisors, alumni, and industry partners.

Our members graduate into roles at leading venture firms, investment banks, and startups — making Moso a launchpad for the next generation of investors.

Our Thesis

We back contrarian founders solving problems the market underestimates — where insight, timing, and execution create outsized outcomes.

Our Process

Sourcing → Due Diligence → Investment Committee → Portfolio Support. Every decision is debated, data-driven, and documented.

Our Community

Members are selected for intellectual curiosity, collaborative spirit, and genuine passion for building great companies.

Our Values

What guides us

01
Intellectual Rigor
Every investment thesis is stress-tested through debate, data, and dissent. We never invest on conviction alone.
02
Founder Partnership
We are long-term partners, not passive shareholders. Our value extends far beyond the check we write.
03
Contrarian Thinking
The best investments are rarely obvious. We seek markets and founders that others overlook or misunderstand.
Student-led. Founder-first.

Get Involved

Work with us

For Founders

Pitch Moso Capital

We invest in pre-seed and seed-stage companies. If you're raising, we'd love to hear from you. We move quickly and give every founder genuine feedback.

  • Check size: $100K – $500K
  • Stage: Pre-seed & Seed
  • Sectors: Tech, Climate, Consumer
  • Decision timeline: 4–6 weeks
  • Geography: US-focused, open globally
For VC Partners

Partner With Moso

We collaborate with leading venture firms to co-invest, share deal flow, and develop the next generation of venture talent. Our members go on to careers at top firms globally.

  • Co-investment opportunities on our deals
  • Access to our curated deal flow pipeline
  • Direct recruiting access to our analysts
  • Guest lectures and firm showcases
  • Joint research and market analysis

Our partners include angels, family offices, and institutional funds who value our unique position within university ecosystems.

For Students

Join Moso as an Analyst

We recruit undergraduate and graduate students each semester. No prior experience required — just intellectual curiosity, genuine interest in venture, and a drive to do great work.

  • Applications open September & January
  • Open to all majors and years
  • Hands-on investing experience from day one
  • Alumni network at top VC firms and startups
